  have hX_sq i : Integrable (fun x ↦ X i x ^ 2) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
    integrable_eval_pi (Integrable.mul_const (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2 0 1).integrable one_le_two)
  have hX_mean i : ∫ x, X i x ∂(Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) = 0 := by
    rw [integral_eval_pi (Integrable.mul_const (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1 0 1).integrable one_le_one), integral_mul_const, gaussianReal_expectation]; simp
  rw [← variance_def' (by infer_instance) (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aestronglyMeasurable, integral_finset_sum _ hX_int, Finset.sum_eq_zero (fun i _ ↦ hX_mean i), zero_pow two_ne_zero, sub_zero]
  rw [iIndepFun.variance_sum (iIndepFun.comp iIndepFun_pi_eval (fun i ↦ measurable_id.mul_const _)) hX_int hX_sq]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
  rw [variance_def' (by infer_instance) (hX_int i).aestronglyMeasurable, hX_mean i, zero_pow two_ne_zero, sub_zero, integral_eval_pi (Integrable.mul_const (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2 0 1).integrable one_le_two), integral_mul_const, ← variance_def' (by infer_instance) (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1 0 1).aestronglyMeasurable, gaussianReal_expectation, gaussianReal_variance]; simp

rw [variance_def', isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti, integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  · simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.sum_mul, sq, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
    rw [integral_finset_sum]
    · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ ↦ ?_
      rw [integral_finset_sum]
      · refine Finset.sum_eq_single i (fun j _ h ↦ ?_) ?_
        · rw [integral_mul_const, integral_const_mul, Measure.integral_pi_univ_split {j} (by simp),
            integral_eval_pi (f := id), integral_id_gaussianReal, mul_zero, mul_zero, integral_zero, mul_zero]
          · exact integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1
          · infer_instance
        · intro; rw [integral_mul_const, ← pow_two, integral_eval_pi (f := (· ^ 2))]
          · simp [integral_pow_two_gaussianReal]
          · exact memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_pow_two_gaussianReal 0 1)
      · intro j _; exact (((integrable_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1)).mul
          (integrable_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1))).mul_const _).const_mul _
    · intro i _; exact integrable_finset_sum _ fun j _ ↦ (((integrable_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1)).mul
          (integrable_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1))).mul_const _).const_mul _
  · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable

end ProbabilityTheory

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti,
    integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  swap; · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable
  simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, ← variance_def]
  rw [variance_sum]
  · have h_var : ∀ i, variance (fun x ↦ x i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) = 1 := by
      intro i
      rw [variance_def, integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable,
        integral_id_gaussianReal 0 1, sub_zero, integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable,
        ← variance_def, integral_id_gaussianReal 0 1, sub_zero, variance_gaussianReal]
      rfl
    simp_rw [variance_smul, h_var, mul_one]
  · exact (indepFuns_pi_eval _).comp (fun i ↦ measurable_id.mul_const _)
  · intro i _; exact (integrable_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable).mul_const _

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti L, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti, integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  swap; · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable
  simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.sum_mul]
  rw [iIndepFun.integral_sum_sq_eq_sum_integral_sq]
  · simp_rw [mul_pow, integral_mul_const,
      integral_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2))]
    have h_sq : ∫ x, x ^ 2 ∂gaussianReal 0 1 = 1 := by
      rw [← gaussianReal_variance 0 1, variance_def, gaussianReal_mean, sub_zero]; rfl
    simp [h_sq]
  · exact iIndepFun_pi_eval.comp (fun i ↦ measurable_id.mul_const (L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)))
  · simp [integral_mul_const, integral_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)),
      gaussianReal_mean]
  · simp [integrable_eval_pi, memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)]
  · simp [integrable_eval_pi, memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2), mul_pow]

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, Finset.sum_pow_two, integral_finset_sum]
  · refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ ↦ Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ ↦ ?_
    by_cases h : i = j
    · subst h; simp [integral_id_sq_gaussianReal, integral_eval_pi, memLp_two_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2)]
    · have hi : Integrable (fun x ↦ x i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
        integrable_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1))
      have hj : Integrable (fun x ↦ x j) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
        integrable_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1))
      rw [← mul_assoc, integral_mul_const, (indepFun_pi_proj _).indepFun h |>.integral_mul hi hj]
      simp [integral_eval_pi hi, integral_id_gaussianReal]
  · intro i _; refine Integrable.sum fun j _ ↦ ?_
    by_cases h : i = j
    · subst h; exact Integrable.mul_const (integrable_eval_pi (memLp_two_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2))) _
    · have hi : Integrable (fun x ↦ x i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
        integrable_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1))
      have hj : Integrable (fun x ↦ x j) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
        integrable_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1))
      exact Integrable.mul_const ((indepFun_pi_proj _).indepFun h |>.integrable_mul hi hj) _

rw [stdGaussianMulti, variance_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [Function.comp_def, map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
  rw [iIndepFun.variance_sum]
  · simp_rw [variance_mul_const, variance_def, integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable,
      integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable, ← variance_def,
      gaussianReal_Var 0 zero_lt_one, mul_one]
  · exact iIndepFun.comp (iIndepFun_pi_eval _) _ (fun i ↦ measurable_id.mul_const _)
  · intro i _; exact Integrable.mul_const (integrable_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable) _

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti L, sub_zero]
  simp only [norm_sq_eq_sq, stdGaussianMulti, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  let μ : Measure (Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E) → ℝ) := Measure.pi (fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1)
  have h1 i : Integrable (fun x ↦ x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)) μ :=
    (integrable_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.mp (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1))).mul_const _
  have h2 i : ∫ x, x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i) ∂μ = 0 := by
    rw [integral_mul_const, integral_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.mp (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)), integral_id_gaussianReal, mul_zero]
  rw [← variance_def' (integrable_finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ h1 i), (by rw [integral_finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ h1 i]; simp [h2]),
    pow_two, zero_mul, sub_zero, variance_sum_of_indepFun (fun i _ ↦ h1 i)]
  · simp_rw [variance_def' (h1 _), h2, pow_two, zero_mul, sub_zero, mul_pow, integral_mul_const]
    simp [integral_eval_pi (memLp_one_iff_integrable.mp (memLp_pow_gaussianReal 1 2)), integral_pow_two_gaussianReal]
  · intro i _ j _ hij; exact (indepFun_pi_proj (fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) hij).comp (measurable_mul_const _) (measurable_mul_const _)

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num),
    stdGaussianMulti, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  let X := fun i (x : Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E) → ℝ) ↦ x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)
  have hX : ∀ i, Integrable (X i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
    fun i ↦ (integrable_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1)).mul_const _
  have : ∫ x, (∑ i, X i x) ^ 2 ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 =
      variance (∑ i, X i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) := by
    rw [variance_def, integral_finset_sum _ hX]
    simp only [integral_mul_const, integral_eval_pi (hf := integrable_id_gaussianReal 0 1),
      integral_id_gaussianReal, mul_zero, Finset.sum_const_zero, sub_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num)]
  rw [this, IndepFun.variance_sum (indepFun_eval_pi _) hX]
  simp_rw [mul_comm, variance_mul_const, variance_def, integral_id_gaussianReal,
    integral_id_sq_gaussianReal, sub_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num), mul_one]

rw [variance, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti, integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  swap; · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable
  simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, sq, Finset.sum_mul_sum, integral_finset_sum (fun _ _ ↦ by fun_prop),
    integral_mul_const, mul_assoc, integral_mul_left]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i]
  · rw [← integral_eval_pi (f := (· ^ 2)), integral_id_sq_gaussianReal, mul_one]
    · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_sq_gaussianReal 1
  · intro j _ hij; rw [integral_pi_eval_mul_eval hij.symm, integral_id_gaussianReal, mul_zero, zero_mul, mul_zero]
    · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
    · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
  · simp

rw [variance_def, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti L, integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  swap; · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable
  simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, sub_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num)]
  have h_int_id : Integrable id (gaussianReal 0 1) := memLp_one_iff_integrable.mp (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)
  have h_int i : Integrable (fun x ↦ x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) :=
    Integrable.mul_const (integrable_eval_pi h_int_id) _
  have h_zero : ∫ x, ∑ i, x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i) ∂Measure.pi (fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) = 0 := by
    simp [integral_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ h_int i), integral_mul_const, integral_eval_pi h_int_id, integral_gaussianReal_self]
  rw [← variance_def, h_zero]
  simp only [add_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num)]
  rw [IndepFun.finset_sum_variance (IndepFun.comp (indepFun_eval_pi _) (fun i ↦ measurable_mul_const _)) (fun i _ ↦ h_int i)]
  simp [mul_comm, variance_mul_const, ← variance_def, integral_eval_pi, integral_id_sq_gaussianReal 0 1, integral_gaussianReal_self 0 1, h_int_id, integrable_id_sq_gaussianReal 0 1]

rw [variance_def' (by sorry), isCentered_stdGaussianMulti L, zero_pow two_pos, sub_zero,
    stdGaussianMulti, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, sq, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum, mul_assoc,
    mul_left_comm, integral_finset_sum (by sorry), integral_finset_sum (by sorry), integral_mul_const]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i (fun j _ hne ↦ ?_) (by simp), integral_eval_pi,
    ← variance_def' (by sorry), variance_gaussianReal, integral_id_gaussianReal]; simp
  · exact (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable one_le_two
  · rw [integral_mul_const, (indepFun_pi_eval hne).integral_mul,
      integral_eval_pi, integral_eval_pi, integral_id_gaussianReal]; simp
    all_goals { sorry }

rw [variance, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti L, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti,
    Measure.map_map L.continuous.measurable (by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [L.map_sum, L.map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [show (fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)) =
    (fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i) ∘ (fun x i ↦ x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i)) by ext; simp,
    ← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), ← Measure.pi_map (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)]
  simp_rw [gaussianReal_map_smul, zero_smul, mul_one,
    Measure.map_sum_gaussianReal Finset.univ _ _ (fun _ _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)]
  simp [integral_pow_two_gaussianReal]
